release_notes:
🚀 Major Update (1.2.0)
- 🕌 Adhan notifications 1 minute before each prayer
- ⚡ 120Hz performance boost — silky smooth scrolling
- 📱 Redesigned home screen widget
- 🎨 Dynamic theme (System / Light / Dark)
- 🧭 Improved prayer time accuracy for all regions
- 📐 Madhab selector (Shafi / Hanafi)
